'''âr-n-r''' ('''ranara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yuke|yuke]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yuke|yuke]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-n-r
|-
! Lemma
| ranara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranarithi|ranarithi]] || [[word:ranariji|ranariji]] || [[word:ranarishi|ranarishi]] || [[word:ranari|ranari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranaruthuth|ranaruthuth]] || [[word:ranarujuj|ranarujuj]] || [[word:ranarushush|ranarushush]] || [[word:ranar|ranar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranaruthu|ranaruthu]] || [[word:ranaruju|ranaruju]] || [[word:ranarushu|ranarushu]] || [[word:ranaru|ranaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranarufuth|ranarufuth]] || [[word:ranarufuj|ranarufuj]] || [[word:ranarufush|ranarufush]] || [[word:ranaruf|ranaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranarethe|ranarethe]] || [[word:ranareje|ranareje]] || [[word:ranareshe|ranareshe]] || [[word:ranare|ranare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranarothoth|ranarothoth]] || [[word:ranarojoj|ranarojoj]] || [[word:ranaroshosh|ranaroshosh]] || [[word:ranar|ranar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranarotho|ranarotho]] || [[word:ranarojo|ranarojo]] || [[word:ranarosho|ranarosho]] || [[word:ranaro|ranaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranarofoth|ranarofoth]] || [[word:ranarofoj|ranarofoj]] || [[word:ranarofosh|ranarofosh]] || [[word:ranarof|ranarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranarĂŠthĂŠ|ranarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ranarĂŠjĂŠ|ranarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ranarĂŠshĂŠ|ranarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ranarĂŠ|ranarĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranarathath|ranarathath]] || [[word:ranarajaj|ranarajaj]] || [[word:ranarashash|ranarashash]] || [[word:ranar|ranar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranaratha|ranaratha]] || [[word:ranaraja|ranaraja]] || [[word:ranarasha|ranarasha]] || [[word:ranara|ranara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranarafath|ranarafath]] || [[word:ranarafaj|ranarafaj]] || [[word:ranarafash|ranarafash]] || [[word:ranaraf|ranaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ranarasha|ranarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goranarasha|goranarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiranarasha|gokiranarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ranarnĂŒsha|ranarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goranarnknĂŒsha|goranarnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiranarnĂŒsha|gokiranarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ranarshĂ«sha|ranarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goranarnkshĂ«sha|goranarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiranarshĂ«sha|gokiranarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranarosha|ranarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranarnkrosha|goranarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranarosha|gokiranarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ranarmusha|ranarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goranarnkmusha|goranarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranarmusha|gokiranarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ranarsherasha|ranarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goranarnksherasha|goranarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiranarsherasha|gokiranarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ranarngasha|ranarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goranarnkngasha|goranarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiranarngasha|gokiranarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ranaryasha|ranaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goranarnkyasha|goranarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiranaryasha|gokiranaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ranaryamasha|ranaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goranarnkyamasha|goranarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiranaryamasha|gokiranaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ranarnĂŒshĂ«sha|ranarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goranarnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goranarnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiranarnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiranarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranarnĂŒrosha|ranarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranarnknĂŒrosha|goranarnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranarnĂŒrosha|gokiranarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranarnĂŒmusha|ranarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranarnknĂŒmusha|goranarnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranarnĂŒmusha|gokiranarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ranarshĂ«nĂŒsha|ranarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goranarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goranarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiranarshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiranarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranarshĂ«rosha|ranarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranarnkshĂ«rosha|goranarnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranarshĂ«rosha|gokiranarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranarshĂ«musha|ranarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranarnkshĂ«musha|goranarnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranarshĂ«musha|gokiranarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ranaronĂŒsha|ranaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goranarnkronĂŒsha|goranarnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiranaronĂŒsha|gokiranaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ranaroshĂ«sha|ranaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goranarnkroshĂ«sha|goranarnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiranaroshĂ«sha|gokiranaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranaromusha|ranaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranarnkromusha|goranarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranaromusha|gokiranaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ranarmunĂŒsha|ranarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goranarnkmunĂŒsha|goranarnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiranarmunĂŒsha|gokiranarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ranarmushĂ«sha|ranarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goranarnkmushĂ«sha|goranarnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiranarmushĂ«sha|gokiranarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranarmurosha|ranarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranarnkmurosha|goranarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranarmurosha|gokiranarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ranar|ranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠr|rĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horanar|horanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠnĂŠr|horĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoranar|hohoranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠnĂŠr|hohorĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒranar|nĂŒranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠnĂŠr|nĂŒrĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒranar|nĂŒnĂŒranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠnĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻranar|nĂŻranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠnĂŠr|nĂŻrĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻranar|nĂŻnĂŻranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠnĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luranar|luranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠnĂŠr|lurĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluranar|luluranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠnĂŠr|lulurĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liranar|liranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠnĂŠr|lirĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliranar|liliranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠnĂŠr|lilirĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koranar|koranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠnĂŠr|korĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoranar|kokoranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠnĂŠr|kokorĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keranar|keranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠnĂŠr|kerĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeranar|kekeranar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠnĂŠr|kekerĂŠnĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
